evaluation_scope: deterministic Act III probe ablation; sealed tau2-bench held-out not run

variants.name: day1_static_opener_baseline
variants.description: Static segment opener; confidence only affects the signal summary line.
variants.notes: Baseline measured by Act III probe before mechanism.

variants.name: confidence_gated_opener_method
variants.description: Segment opener changes from direct to hedged/exploratory based on confidence_phrasing().

variants.name: generic_low_confidence_fallback
variants.description: Design variant: use only the generic Segment 0 opener below confidence 0.5.
variants.notes: Analytical ablation; safer but discards useful segment context.

variants.name: automated_optimization_baseline
variants.notes: Not run in this local pass; pending sealed final evaluation.

delta_a.test: Fisher exact test, one-sided, baseline 0/9 pass vs method 9/9 pass

sealed_held_out_status.reason: Repository guidance says not to run the sealed test split until final evaluation.
required_future_artifacts: Delta B and Delta C reporting
